text: england is my city, london is my skyline

Solid storytelling with some really good atmosphere. There isn't much gameplay per se, but still really well made in my opinion.
A super short game too (2-2.5 hours max) with 100% achievements.

There were a few glitches with Molly and Calvin's stories but they were a one time thing (but I had to restart the game to fix these which was annoying).
the game is still so  good today i wish this got more updates but RIP the owner

I want to enjoy this game, I yern for the gameplay loop.

However its just not there. And I doubt it ever will be. Save your money untill you hear better things.

Genuinely, if you look past the MANY problems this game has, I actually enjoyed the story, the character, mostly the orcs, look janky AF, but i did enjoy the environments, and the story was genuinely fun after a while. Yeah, never though i'd put a positive review
